title: Job Vacancies at Jiji.ng
content:
Jiji.ng is part of Genesis, an international group that serves over 200 Million users from offices in 10 countries. Jiji.ng started in 2014 and has become the largest online marketplace in Nigeria with over 200,000 sellers and 10 Million visitors per month. We have employed over 500 of the brightest minds, all focused towards one goal - bringing sellers and buyers together to interact.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Vendor Acquisition Agent 

Job Location: Kano
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Jiji is the best place to sell anything to real people. It is the biggest free online classified with an advanced security system.
	We provide a simple, hassle-free solution to sell and buy almost anything. We boast of a work environment that promotes and supports career progress.
	This is evident with our growing presence across 5 countries and counting.
	We are hiring Vendor Acquisition Agents who want to build a career in Sales, Marketing, & Business Development.


Your Task


	Communicate and sell Jiji to sellers
	Register clients/sellers on our platform.


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE
	Must be a resident in Kano
	Willingness to learn
	18-45 years of age.


Benefits


	Earn up to N200,000 monthly
	Get paid for every seller you register
	Earn commissions of up to 30% on sales.


Application Closing Date: 31st March, 2026.

Click here to apply online

 

 

2.) Merchant Acquisition Associate

Job Locations: Abuja (FCT) and Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking to hire Merchant Acquisition Associates who want to build a career in Sales, Marketing & Business Development.


Scope of work
As a Merchant Acquisition Associate, you will be required to:


	Identify new businesses interested in marketing and advertising products & services on Jiji and register them on the platform
	Enlighten business owners on the benefits of Jiji’s Premium Services
	Sell Jiji’s Subscription Packages to business owners
	Use CRM tool to update and upload relevant sales information


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc Degree
	Applicants should be between the ages of 18 and 40 years.
	For Abuja, candidates who reside in or can conveniently operate within the following areas are strongly encouraged to proceed: Wuse, Wuse 2, Garki, Jabi, Utako, Lifecamp, Gwarimpa, Apo, Kubwa, Dutse-Alhaji, Jahi, Kado, Lugbe, Nyanya.


Benefits
Join our team to enjoy benefits such as;


	World-class on-the-job experience & training certificate.
	Fantastic career growth trajectory.
	Earn up to N200,000 monthly.
	Learn new skills and gain hands-on job experience.
	Get 17% of the total sales you make as commissions.
	Get up to N34,000 in extra allowances.
	HMO plan upon confirmation.
	Team bonding activities and events.


Application Closing Date: 2nd April, 2026.

Click here to apply online

 

 

3.) Sales Associate 

Job Locations: Abuja (FCT) and Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We are looking to hire Sales Associates who want to build a career in Sales, Marketing & Business Development.


Scope of work
As a Sales Associate, you will be required to:


	Identify new businesses interested in marketing and advertising products & services on Jiji and register them on the platform
	Enlighten business owners on the benefits of Jiji’s Premium Services
	Sell Jiji’s Subscription Packages to business owners
	Use CRM tool to update and upload relevant sales information.


Requirements


	Applicants should be between the ages of 18 and 40 years.
	For Abuja, candidates who reside in or can conveniently operate within the following areas are strongly encouraged to proceed: Wuse, Wuse 2, Garki, Jabi, Utako, Lifecamp, Gwarimpa, Apo, Kubwa, Dutse-Alhaji, Jahi, Kado, Lugbe, Nyanya.


Benefits
Join our team to enjoy benefits such as:


	World-class on-the-job experience & training certificate.
	Fantastic career growth trajectory.
	Earn up to ?200,000 monthly.
	Learn new skills and gain hands-on job experience.
	Get 17% of the total sales you make as commissions.
	Get up to ?34,000 in extra allowances.
	HMO plan upon confirmation.
	Team bonding activities and events.


Application Closing Date: 2nd April, 2026.

Click here to apply online

     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "O&rsquo;la-kleen Holdings Limited which started out with O&rsquo;la-kleen Nig. Ltd a cleaning service company for several multi-national companies, corporate bodies, industrial clients as well as individual clients now has seven other subsidiaries ranging from Defence Products (Land Systems, Air Systems, Naval Systems and Body Armour), Private Cemeteries, Steel and Construction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Accountant &ndash; prepare cost center reports; prepare consolidated financial accounts for all cost centers; control the fixed assets register; review debtors/creditors aging; review all items on the balance sheet monthly; prepare the monthly balance sheet file with schedules for all balance sheet items; prepare annual budgets for individual cost centers; and consolidated view of budgets for management


Responsibilities


	Review all accounting posting for accuracy and completeness
	Prepare Analytical Management Account and its interpretation
	Oversee Account Receivable &amp; Payable management
	Supervise Budget process and ensure budgetary control
	Establishing adequate accounting policy and procedure manual and updating it.
	Ensure Accuracy of payroll Journals
	Substantiates financial transactions by auditing documents.
	Maintains accounting controls by preparing and recommending policies and procedures.
	Reconciles financial discrepancies by collecting and analysing account information.
	Ensure adequate documents are presented for FIRS &amp; LIRS tax audit and provide necessary information to defend company&rsquo;s position.
	Ensure all statutory deductions (PAYE, WHT, PENSION and VAT) are properly captured and remitted before deadlines.
	Computation &amp; preparation of various Financial Analysis for business units and Holding company.
	Ensure Account unit deliver on every task assigned.
	Secures financial information by completing data base backups.
	Coordinate a smooth year-end audit of company&rsquo;s book
	Prepares payments by verifying documentation, and requesting disbursements.
	Answers accounting procedure questions by researching and interpreting accounting policy and regulations.
	Complies with federal, state, and local financial legal requirements by studying existing and new legislation, enforcing adherence to requirements, and advising management on needed actions.
	Maintains customer confidence and protects operations by keeping financial information confidential.
	Maintains professional and technical knowledge by attending educational workshops; reviewing professional publications; establishing personal networks; participating in professional societies.


Salary
N350,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@olakleenholdings.com&nbsp;using &quot;Accountant&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Accountant Job at O’la-kleen Holdings Limited




        
    

        
        O’la-kleen Holdings Limited which started out with O’la-kleen Nig. Ltd a cleaning service company for several multi-national companies, corporate bodies, industrial clients as well as individual clients now has seven other subsidiaries ranging from Defence Products (Land Systems, Air Systems, Naval Systems and Body Armour), Private Cemeteries, Steel and Construction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Accountant – prepare cost center reports; prepare consolidated financial accounts for all cost centers; control the fixed assets register; review debtors/creditors aging; review all items on the balance sheet monthly; prepare the monthly balance sheet file with schedules for all balance sheet items; prepare annual budgets for individual cost centers; and consolidated view of budgets for management


Responsibilities


	Review all accounting posting for accuracy and completeness
	Prepare Analytical Management Account and its interpretation
	Oversee Account Receivable & Payable management
	Supervise Budget process and ensure budgetary control
	Establishing adequate accounting policy and procedure manual and updating it.
	Ensure Accuracy of payroll Journals
	Substantiates financial transactions by auditing documents.
	Maintains accounting controls by preparing and recommending policies and procedures.
	Reconciles financial discrepancies by collecting and analysing account information.
	Ensure adequate documents are presented for FIRS & LIRS tax audit and provide necessary information to defend company’s position.
	Ensure all statutory deductions (PAYE, WHT, PENSION and VAT) are properly captured and remitted before deadlines.
	Computation & preparation of various Financial Analysis for business units and Holding company.
	Ensure Account unit deliver on every task assigned.
	Secures financial information by completing data base backups.
	Coordinate a smooth year-end audit of company’s book
	Prepares payments by verifying documentation, and requesting disbursements.
	Answers accounting procedure questions by researching and interpreting accounting policy and regulations.
	Complies with federal, state, and local financial legal requirements by studying existing and new legislation, enforcing adherence to requirements, and advising management on needed actions.
	Maintains customer confidence and protects operations by keeping financial information confidential.
	Maintains professional and technical knowledge by attending educational workshops; reviewing professional publications; establishing personal networks; participating in professional societies.


Salary
N350,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@olakleenholdings.com using "Accountant" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Field Recovery Officer",
  "description": "ICS Outsourcing Limited is Nigeria&rsquo;s leading Outsourcing Company and Business Support Solutions provider. We offer a comprehensive range of outsourcing services ranging from People Outsourcing to Sales BPO to all kinds and sizes of business. Value added services to our client&rsquo;s has is our desire. We have a reputation for satisfying and surpassing our client&rsquo;s expectations. We are one of the Top indigenous Companies in Nigeria to work for. Outsourcing in Nigeria, Outsource To Nigeria, Top Companies in Nigeria, Nigeria, outsourcing company in Nigeria, top outsourcing company in Nigeria, top, list of outsourcing company in Nigeria, outsourcing firms in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Field Recovery Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Ketu / Mile 12, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Field Recovery Officer is responsible for recovering outstanding debts from delinquent customers through field visits, negotiations, and structured repayment arrangements.
	The role involves maintaining positive customer relationships while ensuring compliance with company policies and regulatory guidelines.


Key Responsibilities


	Supervise and coordinate the activities of Field Verification Officers across the state.
	Ensure all verifications are completed in a timely and accurate manner.
	Escalate operational issues proactively and support prompt resolution.
	Conduct physical visits to business premises to evaluate financial operations, inventory, and overall business health.
	Carry out on-site verifications of residential and business addresses.
	Visit guarantors and referees to confirm their awareness and availability in case of future contact.
	Compile and submit detailed daily reports on all verification activities.
	Perform other relevant duties as assigned by your supervisor.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Minimum of HND / B.Sc. in any relevant discipline.
	1&ndash;3 years of experience in debt recovery, credit control, or field collections (preferably in financial services, microfinance, or FMCG).
	In-depth geographical knowledge of the local environment
	A minimum of 2 years of experience in credit risk or field verification is an added advantage
	Apt attention to details
	Proven simple/complex analytical skills
	Excellent communication, presentation and interpersonal skills
	Agility and perseverance


Key Competencies:


	Negotiation &amp; Conflict Resolution
	Target-driven &amp; Result-oriented
	Integrity &amp; Professionalism
	Strong Problem-Solving Skills
	Resilience and Ability to Handle Pressure.


Salary
N201,000 monthly.

Mode of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send&nbsp;their CV&nbsp;to:&nbsp;aawosanya@icsoutsourcing.com&nbsp;using &quot;Field Recovery Officer&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Field Recovery Officer Job at ICS Outsourcing Limited




        
    

        
        ICS Outsourcing Limited is Nigeria’s leading Outsourcing Company and Business Support Solutions provider. We offer a comprehensive range of outsourcing services ranging from People Outsourcing to Sales BPO to all kinds and sizes of business. Value added services to our client’s has is our desire. We have a reputation for satisfying and surpassing our client’s expectations. We are one of the Top indigenous Companies in Nigeria to work for. Outsourcing in Nigeria, Outsource To Nigeria, Top Companies in Nigeria, Nigeria, outsourcing company in Nigeria, top outsourcing company in Nigeria, top, list of outsourcing company in Nigeria, outsourcing firms in Nigeria.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Field Recovery Officer
Job Location: Ketu / Mile 12, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Field Recovery Officer is responsible for recovering outstanding debts from delinquent customers through field visits, negotiations, and structured repayment arrangements.
	The role involves maintaining positive customer relationships while ensuring compliance with company policies and regulatory guidelines.


Key Responsibilities


	Supervise and coordinate the activities of Field Verification Officers across the state.
	Ensure all verifications are completed in a timely and accurate manner.
	Escalate operational issues proactively and support prompt resolution.
	Conduct physical visits to business premises to evaluate financial operations, inventory, and overall business health.
	Carry out on-site verifications of residential and business addresses.
	Visit guarantors and referees to confirm their awareness and availability in case of future contact.
	Compile and submit detailed daily reports on all verification activities.
	Perform other relevant duties as assigned by your supervisor.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Minimum of HND / B.Sc. in any relevant discipline.
	1–3 years of experience in debt recovery, credit control, or field collections (preferably in financial services, microfinance, or FMCG).
	In-depth geographical knowledge of the local environment
	A minimum of 2 years of experience in credit risk or field verification is an added advantage
	Apt attention to details
	Proven simple/complex analytical skills
	Excellent communication, presentation and interpersonal skills
	Agility and perseverance


Key Competencies:


	Negotiation & Conflict Resolution
	Target-driven & Result-oriented
	Integrity & Professionalism
	Strong Problem-Solving Skills
	Resilience and Ability to Handle Pressure.


Salary
N201,000 monthly.

Mode of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: aawosanya@icsoutsourcing.com using "Field Recovery Officer" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Content Creator Job at R & R Recruiting Services
content:
R & R Recruiting Services is a Recruitment Agency, Training, Consulting & Human Resources Management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Creator

Job Location: Iyana Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Create engaging photo and video content for social media platforms (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, etc.).
	Develop creative concepts and content ideas aligned with the brand.
	Shoot, edit, and publish high-quality videos and graphics.
	Write compelling captions and manage posting schedules.
	Monitor content performance and suggest strategies for growth.
	Stay updated with social media trends and viral content formats.


 Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV to: r2recruitmentservices@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information call: 07040950515.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business & Sales Lead",
  "description": "Davethan Technologies Limited specializes in scalable software, cloud apps, AI-driven business intelligence, and cybersecurity. Operating in the UK and Nigeria, we enhance efficiency, security, and digital transformation. Our services include Managed IT, procurement, custom software, and project management, helping businesses streamline operations and scale successfully.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business &amp; Sales Lead

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT) / Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)
Industry: IT Services / SaaS / Technology Solutions

Role Overview


	We are now looking for a&nbsp;Business &amp; Sales Lead&nbsp;who can build revenue engines, close high-value deals, and shape the commercial strategy of the company.
	As the Business &amp; Sales Lead, you will own revenue growth, strategic partnerships, and market expansion.
	You will work directly with founders and product teams to drive customer acquisition, refine GTM strategy, and scale the sales pipeline.
	This is not a support role. This is a revenue leadership position.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute B2B sales strategies for IT/SaaS solutions
	Own end-to-end sales cycle: prospecting &rarr; pitching &rarr; negotiation &rarr; closing
	Build and manage a high-quality sales pipeline
	Identify new markets, partnerships, and revenue channels
	Lead client presentations, demos, and proposal negotiations
	Create pricing strategies aligned with market positioning
	Collaborate with marketing for demand generation campaigns
	Track KPIs, revenue forecasting, and performance metrics
	Represent the company in networking and industry events


What Success Looks Like (First 6 Months)


	Build a qualified sales pipeline within 60 days
	Close minimum 3&ndash;5 strategic deals
	Define repeatable sales processes
	Establish 2+ strategic partnerships
	Contribute to revenue growth roadmap


Requirements
Mandatory Requirements (Non-Negotiable):


	Minimum&nbsp;3+ years of experience in B2B IT/SaaS sales or business development
	Proven track record of meeting or exceeding revenue targets
	Experience closing mid-to-large ticket enterprise deals
	Strong understanding of IT services, SaaS models, or digital transformation
	Demonstrated ability to generate leads independently
	Excellent negotiation and contract-closing skills
	Data-driven approach to pipeline and forecasting
	Fluent in English (written and spoken).


Essential Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Strategic thinking with execution capability
	Strong financial and commercial acumen
	CRM proficiency (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho)
	High-impact presentation and pitching skills
	Market research &amp; competitive positioning
	Stakeholder management at C-level
	Growth mindset with startup adaptability
	Ability to work in fast-paced, ambiguous environments
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.


Preferred Qualifications (Bonus):


	Experience in scaling early-stage startups
	Experience in international markets
	Technical background or understanding of software development lifecycle
	Existing network within enterprise IT buyers.


Compensation &amp; Benefits


	Competitive base salary
	Attractive performance-based commission
	ESOP/Equity opportunity (for high performers)
	Flexible work environment
	Leadership growth opportunity


Who Should Apply?


	Revenue-driven professionals
	Builders, not followers
	Strategic closers who love ownership
	Individuals who want to grow into a Chief Revenue Officer role.


Note:&nbsp;If you are ready to build, scale, and lead revenue in a high-growth IT startup - we want to hear from you.",

Business & Sales Lead Job at Davethan Technologies Limited




        
    

        
        Davethan Technologies Limited specializes in scalable software, cloud apps, AI-driven business intelligence, and cybersecurity. Operating in the UK and Nigeria, we enhance efficiency, security, and digital transformation. Our services include Managed IT, procurement, custom software, and project management, helping businesses streamline operations and scale successfully.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business & Sales Lead

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) / Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)
Industry: IT Services / SaaS / Technology Solutions

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are now looking for a Business & Sales Lead who can build revenue engines, close high-value deals, and shape the commercial strategy of the company.
	As the Business & Sales Lead, you will own revenue growth, strategic partnerships, and market expansion.
	You will work directly with founders and product teams to drive customer acquisition, refine GTM strategy, and scale the sales pipeline.
	This is not a support role. This is a revenue leadership position.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute B2B sales strategies for IT/SaaS solutions
	Own end-to-end sales cycle: prospecting → pitching → negotiation → closing
	Build and manage a high-quality sales pipeline
	Identify new markets, partnerships, and revenue channels
	Lead client presentations, demos, and proposal negotiations
	Create pricing strategies aligned with market positioning
	Collaborate with marketing for demand generation campaigns
	Track KPIs, revenue forecasting, and performance metrics
	Represent the company in networking and industry events


What Success Looks Like (First 6 Months)


	Build a qualified sales pipeline within 60 days
	Close minimum 3–5 strategic deals
	Define repeatable sales processes
	Establish 2+ strategic partnerships
	Contribute to revenue growth roadmap


Requirements
Mandatory Requirements (Non-Negotiable):


	Minimum 3+ years of experience in B2B IT/SaaS sales or business development
	Proven track record of meeting or exceeding revenue targets
	Experience closing mid-to-large ticket enterprise deals
	Strong understanding of IT services, SaaS models, or digital transformation
	Demonstrated ability to generate leads independently
	Excellent negotiation and contract-closing skills
	Data-driven approach to pipeline and forecasting
	Fluent in English (written and spoken).


Essential Skills & Competencies:


	Strategic thinking with execution capability
	Strong financial and commercial acumen
	CRM proficiency (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho)
	High-impact presentation and pitching skills
	Market research & competitive positioning
	Stakeholder management at C-level
	Growth mindset with startup adaptability
	Ability to work in fast-paced, ambiguous environments
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.


Preferred Qualifications (Bonus):


	Experience in scaling early-stage startups
	Experience in international markets
	Technical background or understanding of software development lifecycle
	Existing network within enterprise IT buyers.


Compensation & Benefits


	Competitive base salary
	Attractive performance-based commission
	ESOP/Equity opportunity (for high performers)
	Flexible work environment
	Leadership growth opportunity


Who Should Apply?


	Revenue-driven professionals
	Builders, not followers
	Strategic closers who love ownership
	Individuals who want to grow into a Chief Revenue Officer role.


Note: If you are ready to build, scale, and lead revenue in a high-growth IT startup - we want to hear from you.    

    

        Click here to Apply
